summary: Gamma에 민감정보 프롬프트 입력 후 '개요 생성' 실행. 카드 10개 설정이었으나 1개만 생성되고 내용이 비어있음. AI 개요 생성 응답이 APF에 의해 차단된 것으로 추정. 그러나 APF 경고 텍스트는 표시되지 않음. 빈 윤곽선으로 인해 최종 프레젠테이션 생성 불가.

details.card_content: empty - card 1 has number only, no text content
details.notes: Gamma uses SSE for AI outline generation. APF's 9-chunk SSE block response appears to have intercepted the outline generation, resulting in a nearly empty outline (1 card with no content instead of expected 10 cards with topics). No APF warning text was displayed to the user. The empty outline effectively prevents further generation since there is no content to build upon. The 'generate' button remained visible but the outline was unusable.
